hero_title: Ministry of Roads, Transport, Housing & Construction, Industries and Rural Development - NWP
vision_text: To create a prosperous society full of harmony for the North West.
mission_text: To create a prosperous and dignified life for the people by sustainably developing the sectors of roads, transport, housing and construction, industries and rural development in the North Western Province.
